<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="dark">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>SideDecked — Card Browse Wireframe (Voltage)</title>
  <script src="https://mcp.figma.com/mcp/html-to-design/capture.js" async></script>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@500;600;700;800&family=Barlow:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    /* =============================================
       VOLTAGE DESIGN TOKENS (Dark Mode)
       ============================================= */
    :root {
      --brand-primary: #8B5CF6;
      --brand-secondary: #FF7849;
      --brand-primary-subtle: #1E1A3A;
      --brand-secondary-subtle: #2A1A12;

      --bg-base: #09090F;
      --bg-surface-1: #18162A;
      --bg-surface-2: #21203A;
      --bg-surface-3: #2C2A4A;
      --bg-surface-4: #38365C;

      --text-primary: #F0EEFF;
      --text-secondary: #B8B0D8;
      --text-tertiary: #7B72A8;

      --border-default: #2C2A4A;
      --border-strong: #4A4680;

      --positive: #10B981;
      --negative: #EF4444;
      --warning: #F59E0B;
      --info: #3B82F6;
      --interactive: #8B5CF6;

      --game-mtg: #A78BFA;
      --game-pokemon: #FCD34D;
      --game-ygo: #60A5FA;
      --game-op: #34D399;

      --font-display: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
      --font-heading: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
      --font-body: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      --font-mono: 'DM Mono', monospace;

      --radius-sm: 6px;
      --radius-md: 10px;
      --radius-lg: 14px;
      --radius-xl: 20px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       RESET + BASE
       ============================================= */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      background: #060610;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      line-height: 1.5;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }
    img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }

    /* =============================================
       WIREFRAME CANVAS
       ============================================= */
    .canvas {
      display: flex;
      gap: 80px;
      padding: 60px;
      align-items: flex-start;
      justify-content: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    .frame-label {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .frame-label .dim {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 400;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      background: var(--brand-primary-subtle);
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 4px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       DESKTOP FRAME (1440px)
       ============================================= */
    .desktop-frame {
      width: 1440px;
      min-height: 1200px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* =============================================
       MOBILE FRAME (390px)
       ============================================= */
    .mobile-frame {
      width: 390px;
      min-height: 844px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-radius: 40px;
      border: 3px solid var(--border-strong);
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .mobile-frame::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 126px;
      height: 28px;
      background: #000;
      border-radius: 0 0 18px 18px;
      z-index: 50;
    }

    /* =============================================
       ANNOTATION BADGES
       ============================================= */
    .annotation {
      position: absolute;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #fff;
      background: var(--brand-secondary);
      padding: 3px 8px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      z-index: 40;
      pointer-events: none;
      line-height: 1.3;
    }
    .annotation.violet { background: var(--brand-primary); }
    .annotation.green { background: var(--positive); }
    .annotation.blue { background: var(--info); }
    .annotation.orange { background: var(--warning); color: #000; }
    .annotation--inline {
      position: relative;
      display: inline-flex;
      margin-left: 12px;
    }
    .annotation--api {
      background: var(--positive);
    }
    .annotation--breakpoint {
      background: var(--warning);
      color: #000;
    }
    .annotation--behavior {
      background: var(--info);
    }

    /* =============================================
       BREADCRUMB BAR
       ============================================= */
    .filters-bar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 12px 32px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    .filters-bar-left {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .breadcrumb {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .breadcrumb a {
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .breadcrumb a:hover { color: var(--brand-primary); }
    .breadcrumb .sep { color: var(--border-strong); }
    .breadcrumb .current { color: var(--text-primary); font-weight: 500; }

    .filter-chip {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 4px 10px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 500;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .filter-chip .x {
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1;
      opacity: 0.7;
    }
    .filter-chip.violet { background: rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.18); color: var(--game-mtg); border: 1px solid rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.3); }
    .filter-chip.green { background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.18); color: var(--positive); border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3); }
    .filter-chip.coral { background: rgba(255, 120, 73, 0.18); color: var(--brand-secondary); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 120, 73, 0.3); }
    .clear-all {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      cursor: pointer;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
    }
    .clear-all:hover { color: var(--negative); }

    /* =============================================
       GAME SELECTOR STRIP
       ============================================= */
    .game-strip {
      padding: 24px 32px 0;
      position: relative;
    }
    .game-strip-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .game-strip-card {
      position: relative;
      border-radius: 12px;
      overflow: hidden;
      aspect-ratio: 16 / 7;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
      border: 2px solid transparent;
    }
    .game-strip-card:hover {
      transform: scale(1.02);
      box-shadow: 0 6px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
    }
    .game-strip-card.active--all {
      border-color: var(--brand-primary);
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.25);
    }
    .game-strip-card.active--mtg {
      border-color: var(--game-mtg);
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.25);
    }
    .game-strip-card.active--poke {
      border-color: var(--game-pokemon);
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(252, 211, 77, 0.25);
    }
    .game-strip-card.active--ygo {
      border-color: var(--game-ygo);
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.25);
    }
    .game-strip-card.active--op {
      border-color: var(--game-op);
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.25);
    }
    .game-strip-bg {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-size: cover;
      background-position: center;
    }
    .game-strip-bg::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-image:
        radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, transparent 60%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 70% 60%, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 0%, transparent 50%);
    }
    .game-strip-bg--all  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a103a 0%, #2a1a4a 50%, #1a2030 100%); }
    .game-strip-bg--mtg  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a103a 0%, #2d1b69 100%); }
    .game-strip-bg--poke { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a08 0%, #3d3000 100%); }
    .game-strip-bg--ygo  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #081a30 0%, #0d2b5e 100%); }
    .game-strip-bg--op   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #081a14 0%, #0d3d2b 100%); }

    .game-strip-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      padding: 14px 16px;
    }
    .game-strip-overlay--all  { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(139,92,246,0.08) 0%, rgba(139,92,246,0.45) 100%); }
    .game-strip-overlay--mtg  { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(167,139,250,0.08) 0%, rgba(167,139,250,0.50) 100%); }
    .game-strip-overlay--poke { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(252,211,77,0.06) 0%, rgba(252,211,77,0.45) 100%); }
    .game-strip-overlay--ygo  { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(96,165,250,0.08) 0%, rgba(96,165,250,0.50) 100%); }
    .game-strip-overlay--op   { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(52,211,153,0.06) 0%, rgba(52,211,153,0.45) 100%); }

    .game-strip-name {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 17px;
      color: white;
      margin-bottom: 2px;
    }
    .game-strip-count {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    }

    /* =============================================
       CATEGORY QUICK LINKS
       ============================================= */
    .category-strip {
      padding: 16px 32px 0;
    }
    .category-scroll {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      padding-bottom: 4px;
      scrollbar-width: thin;
      scrollbar-color: var(--bg-surface-3) transparent;
    }
    .category-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { height: 3px; }
    .category-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    .category-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--bg-surface-3); border-radius: 3px; }
    .category-pill {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 6px 18px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      background: transparent;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .category-pill:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong); color: var(--text-primary); }
    .category-pill.active {
      background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.12);
      border-color: var(--brand-primary);
      color: var(--brand-primary);
    }

    /* =============================================
       POPULAR SETS CAROUSEL
       ============================================= */
    .sets-section {
      padding: 20px 32px 0;
      position: relative;
    }
    .sets-section-label {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .sets-scroll {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      padding-bottom: 8px;
      scrollbar-width: thin;
      scrollbar-color: var(--bg-surface-3) transparent;
    }
    .sets-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { height: 3px; }
    .sets-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    .sets-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--bg-surface-3); border-radius: 3px; }
    .set-card {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      width: 200px;
      padding: 16px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
    }
    .set-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      border-color: var(--border-strong);
    }
    .set-card-icon {
      width: 48px;
      height: 48px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .set-card-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 2px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .set-card-count {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }

    /* =============================================
       ACTIVE FILTERS + RESULTS BAR
       ============================================= */
    .results-bar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 14px 32px;
      background: var(--bg-base);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .results-bar-left {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .results-count {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .results-count strong {
      color: var(--text-primary);
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .results-sort {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .view-toggle {
      display: flex;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .view-toggle-btn {
      width: 34px;
      height: 30px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      background: transparent;
      border: none;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      font-size: 14px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .view-toggle-btn.active {
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: #fff;
    }
    .sort-dropdown {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 6px 12px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .sort-dropdown .arrow { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-tertiary); }

    /* =============================================
       MAIN LAYOUT (Sidebar + Grid)
       ============================================= */
    .search-layout {
      display: flex;
      min-height: 900px;
    }

    /* Sidebar Filters */
    .sidebar {
      width: 280px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      padding: 24px 20px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
    }
    .filter-section {
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    .filter-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .filter-title {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    }
    .filter-count {
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      padding: 1px 7px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-weight: 500;
    }
    .filter-chevron {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      transition: transform 0.15s;
    }
    .filter-divider {
      height: 1px;
      background: var(--border-default);
      margin: 0 0 24px;
    }

    /* Checkbox filter */
    .filter-check {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      padding: 5px 0;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .filter-check .checkbox {
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border-strong);
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }
    .filter-check .checkbox.checked {
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border-color: var(--brand-primary);
    }
    .filter-check .checkbox.checked::after {
      content: '\2713';
      font-size: 11px;
      color: #fff;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .filter-check .game-dot {
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .filter-check .label {
      flex: 1;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .filter-check .count {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
    }

    /* Search-in-filter input */
    .filter-search-input {
      width: 100%;
      height: 30px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      padding: 0 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    /* Rarity badges */
    .rarity-badges {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .rarity-badge {
      padding: 4px 10px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 500;
      border: 1px solid;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    /* Condition chips */
    .condition-chips {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .condition-chip {
      padding: 4px 12px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
    }
    .condition-chip.active {
      border-color: var(--positive);
      color: var(--positive);
      background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1);
    }

    /* Price range slider */
    .price-range {
      padding: 4px 0;
    }
    .price-slider-track {
      height: 4px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      border-radius: 2px;
      position: relative;
      margin: 12px 0;
    }
    .price-slider-fill {
      position: absolute;
      left: 0%;
      right: 52%;
      height: 100%;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border-radius: 2px;
    }
    .price-slider-thumb {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border: 2px solid var(--text-primary);
      cursor: pointer;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }
    .price-slider-thumb.left { left: 0%; }
    .price-slider-thumb.right { left: 48%; }
    .price-inputs {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      align-items: center;
    }
    .price-input {
      flex: 1;
      height: 32px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      padding: 0 8px;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      text-align: center;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }
    .price-dash {
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      font-size: 14px;
    }

    /* Show all link */
    .show-all-link {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      cursor: pointer;
      margin-top: 6px;
      display: inline-block;
    }

    /* =============================================
       CARD GRID
       ============================================= */
    .grid-area {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 20px 24px;
    }
    .card-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .card-item {
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 12px;
      position: relative;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
    }
    .card-item:hover {
      border-color: var(--border-strong);
    }
    /* Hover annotation on first card */
    .card-item:first-child::after {
      content: 'hover: glass border + shadow';
      position: absolute;
      top: -10px;
      right: -4px;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 9px;
      color: var(--brand-secondary);
      background: rgba(255, 120, 73, 0.15);
      padding: 2px 6px;
      border-radius: 3px;
      border: 1px dashed var(--brand-secondary);
      white-space: nowrap;
      z-index: 5;
    }
    .card-image {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 5 / 7;
      background: var(--bg-surface-3);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }
    .card-image .img-label {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      text-align: center;
      padding: 4px;
      line-height: 1.3;
    }
    .card-image .game-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      top: 6px;
      left: 6px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      background: rgba(9, 9, 15, 0.75);
      backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
      padding: 2px 7px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }
    .card-image .game-indicator .dot {
      width: 6px;
      height: 6px;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    .card-details { padding: 0 2px; }
    .card-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
      margin-bottom: 2px;
    }
    .card-set {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .card-meta {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .card-condition {
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 20px;
    }
    .card-condition.nm { background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.12); color: var(--positive); }
    .card-condition.lp { background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.12); color: var(--warning); }
    .card-condition.mp { background: rgba(255, 120, 73, 0.12); color: var(--brand-secondary); }
    .card-condition.hp { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12); color: var(--negative); }
    .card-price {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
    }
    .card-seller {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      margin-top: 6px;
    }
    .card-seller-name {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .card-seller-stars {
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--warning);
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
    .card-add-btn {
      width: 100%;
      height: 32px;
      margin-top: 8px;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 500;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 4px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       SKELETON LOADING CARDS
       ============================================= */
    @keyframes skeleton-pulse {
      0% { background-position: 200% 0; }
      100% { background-position: -200% 0; }
    }
    .skeleton-card {
      background: var(--bg-surface-1);
      border: 1px dashed var(--border-strong);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 12px;
      position: relative;
    }
    .skeleton-image {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 5 / 7;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--bg-surface-2) 25%, var(--bg-surface-3) 50%, var(--bg-surface-2) 75%);
      background-size: 400% 100%;
      animation: skeleton-pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .skeleton-line {
      height: 12px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--bg-surface-2) 25%, var(--bg-surface-3) 50%, var(--bg-surface-2) 75%);
      background-size: 400% 100%;
      animation: skeleton-pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .skeleton-line.short { width: 60%; }
    .skeleton-line.medium { width: 80%; }

    /* =============================================
       EMPTY STATE
       ============================================= */
    .empty-state {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 48px 32px;
      border: 1px dashed var(--border-strong);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      margin: 24px 32px;
      position: relative;
    }
    .empty-state-icon {
      width: 64px;
      height: 64px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto 16px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .empty-state-icon svg {
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
    }
    .empty-state-title {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .empty-state-msg {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .empty-state-suggestion {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .empty-state-suggestion strong {
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      cursor: pointer;
    }
    .empty-state-btn {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 8px 20px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      background: var(--bg-surface-2);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
    }

    /* =============================================
       PAGINATION
       ============================================= */
    .pagination-wrap {
      padding: 32px 24px 40px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .pagination-showing {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .pagination {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
    }
    .page-btn {
      min-width: 34px;
      height: 34px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      background: transparent;
      border: 1px solid transparent;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-family: var(--font-body);
    }
    .page-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-surface-2); }
    .page-btn.active {
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      color: #fff;
      font-weight: 600;
      border-color: var(--brand-primary);
    }
    .page-btn.nav-arrow {
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      font-size: 14px;
    }
    .page-dots {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      padding: 0 4px;
    }

    /* =============================================
       TRENDING CARDS STRIP (with price movement)
       ============================================= */
    .trending-strip {
      padding: 48px 0;
    }
    .trending-strip .section-label {
      padding: 0 32px;
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .trending-scroll {

      width: 180px;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.15s;

    .trending-card-img {
      width: 100%;
      aspect-ratio: 5 / 7;
      border-radius: 12px;

      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;

    .trending-card-img .card-art-placeholder {

      height: 100%;

      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 8px;

      height: 40px;

    .trending-card-name {
      font-family: var(--font-heading);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      margin-bottom: 2px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .trending-card-set {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden;
      text-overflow: ellipsis;
    }
    .trending-card-price-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    .trending-card-price {

      color: var(--positive);
      background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.12);
    }
    .price-movement.down {
      color: var(--negative);
      background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);
    }

    /* =============================================
       SELLER CTA BANNER
       ============================================= */
    .seller-cta {
      margin: 0 32px 48px;
      border-radius: 20px;

      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .seller-cta::before {
      content: '';

    .seller-cta p {

    /* =============================================
       ENDPOINT ANNOTATION
       ============================================= */
    .endpoint-note {

       MOBILE STYLES
       ============================================= */

    /* Mobile game selector pills */

# S01: Voltage Design System Foundation

**Footer rewritten to wireframe spec, PriceTag tabular figures applied, design system foundation audited and locked — 678 tests passing, zero alert() calls, zero hardcoded light-mode colors in shared components.**

## What Happened

The Footer was a 3-column grid with `bg-primary` violet background — completely wrong versus the wireframe. Rewrote it as a single-row minimal bar: `border-t` separator, gradient logo text ("SideDecked" via SideDeckedLogo), 5 inline nav links (About, FAQ, Terms, Privacy, Contact), 3 social icon buttons (Discord custom SVG, X and GitHub via Lucide) with `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"`, and centered copyright with dynamic year. # T01: Restructure browse page with wireframe layout and shared components

**Browse page restructured from 33-line wrapper to full wireframe layout with 6 new components, CardSearchGrid extracted as shared sidebar+grid, 693 tests passing (15 new).**

## What Happened

Rewrote `CardBrowsingPage` from a simple `AlgoliaSearchResults` wrapper to a fully composed page matching the wireframe section order: BrowseBreadcrumbs → GameSelectorStrip → CategoryPills → PopularSetsCarousel → ResultsBar → CardSearchGrid → placeholder divs for TrendingStrip and SellerCTA (T02 scope).

Created 6 new components:

- **GameSelectorStrip**: 5-item horizontal grid (All Games + 4 TCGs). Desktop renders a 5-column grid with gradient backgrounds, game-colored borders + glow shadows on active state. Mobile renders a scrollable pill row with dot indicators. Syncs with Algolia `game` facet via `useRefinementList` and persists selection to `sd_game_pref` cookie. Clearing to "All Games" removes the cookie. Card counts come from Algolia facet counts.

- **CategoryPills**: Horizontal scroll of 7 category pills matching wireframe. Active pill gets purple bg+border. MVP uses local state — actual Algolia facet filtering deferred until backend facets exist.

- **PopularSetsCarousel**: Horizontal scroll of set cards (200px wide, surface-1 bg). Game-reactive — receives gameCode prop and renders appropriate sets from hardcoded `POPULAR_SETS` data. Each card shows set code icon, name, card count with hover translateY effect.

- **BrowseBreadcrumbs**: Simple breadcrumb bar (Home > Browse Cards) with wireframe styling — 12px text, tertiary color, surface-1 bg, bottom border. Accepts `currentLabel` prop for reuse by search page.

- **ResultsBar**: Flex row with ActiveFilterChips + results count (left) and view toggle + sort dropdown (right). View toggle is a two-button segmented control — active button gets brand-primary bg. Uses `useStats` for hit count.

- **BrowsePageGameTracker**: Headless component that observes Algolia game facet refinements and reports active game code to parent via callback. Bridges GameSelectorStrip → PopularSetsCarousel without prop drilling.

Extracted **CardSearchGrid** from `AlgoliaSearchResults` — contains the sidebar (280px `SearchFilters`) + card hit grid (flex-1) + skeleton/empty states + load-more button. `AlgoliaSearchResults` now delegates to `CardSearchGrid` for its grid area, maintaining backward compatibility for the search page.

`CardBrowsingPage` now owns its own `InstantSearchNext` provider so it can use Algolia hooks directly in its sub-components.

## Verification

- `npx vitest run src/components/cards/__tests__/CardBrowsingPage.test.tsx` — **11 tests pass** (section order, component rendering, data-testid presence, no hardcoded colors)
- `npx vitest run src/components/cards/__tests__/GameSelectorStrip.test.tsx` — **12 tests pass** (5 items render, active state, cookie sync, refine calls, gradient uniqueness, border colors)
- `npx vitest run` — **693 tests pass across 69 files** (678 baseline + 15 new, zero regressions)
- `npm run build` — production build succeeds

## Diagnostics
